title: Women's Careers in Health Technology Research and Innovation 2018-2020
description: The dataset consists of interviews with women who have doctoral degrees and work in the field of health technology. The data were collected as part of the NORDWIT (Nordic Centre of Excellence on Women in Technology Driven Careers) project by Uppsala University, Tampere University and Norwegian research institute Vestlandsforsking. The main focus of the interviews were the interviewees' career stories in research and innovation. The interviewees were also asked about their current employment situ
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
